name: Coffee Flavor Color Dictionary
description: 用于咖啡风味渐变卡的稳定语义配色词典。标准风味词参考 WCR/SCA 感官分类并结合精品咖啡市场常见正向描述扩展；所有 HEX 色值均为自定义视觉映射，不是 SCA 官方配色。

weighting.formula: rawWeight[i] = 0.82 ^ i; normalize all raw weights to sum to 1

priority: semantic family fallback with stable hash
normalization: remove whitespace, hyphens, underscores, apostrophes and brackets
treat Chinese and English punctuation as separators
doNot: do not invent a new random HEX for an unknown word
do not let composition seed change a flavor's palette color
do not map a modifier word as an independent flavor when a base flavor is present

modifierRules.note: 降低明度与饱和度，偏褐
略深并轻微向红紫偏移
更浅、更柔和，混入奶油色
提高明度并降低饱和度
